name: arnav-weather-web
description: Arnav Weather Web with responsive navigation, light/dark themes, forecasts, air quality, favorites, and a secure OpenWeather API proxy.
author: Arnav

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scripts/theme.js && node --check scripts/router.js && node --check scripts/weather.js && node --check scripts/api.js && node --check scripts/search.js && node --check scripts/favorites.js && node --check scripts/settings.js && node --check scripts/air-quality.js && node --check scripts/animations.js && node --check scripts/navigation.js && node --check scripts/main.js && node --check netlify/functions/weather.js && node --check sw.js
